default_disclosure: Disclosure: ForgeCore may earn a commission if you buy through partner links, but recommendations are based on workflow fit, not payout.

rules.approved_link_policy: Only use URLs listed in approved_links. If a tool fits but no approved link exists, mention the tool without affiliate language.

approved_tools.name: Castmagic
use_when: The workflow starts from recorded calls, podcasts, webinars, interviews, or videos.
The reader needs transcripts, summaries, newsletters, show notes, or social snippets from recordings.
The article is about content repurposing, sales-call summaries, expert interview workflows, or creator operations.
do_not_use_when: The operator only writes text and does not record audio or video.
A simple transcript pasted into ChatGPT would be enough.
The article is about analytics, coding, finance, cybersecurity, or unrelated automation.
approved_tools.example_disclosure: Disclosure: ForgeCore may earn a commission if you buy Castmagic through a partner link, but use it only when recordings are already part of your workflow.

approved_tools.name: OpusClip
use_when: The workflow turns long videos, webinars, or podcasts into short-form clips.
The reader is a creator, consultant, educator, or founder using video for distribution.
The article compares AI clipping, repurposing, or creator distribution tools.
do_not_use_when: The reader has no long-form video source material.
The goal is written content, not short video distribution.
Manual clip selection is needed for high-stakes brand or client work.
approved_tools.example_disclosure: Disclosure: ForgeCore may earn a commission if you buy OpusClip through a partner link, but it only makes sense if you already publish long-form video.

approved_tools.name: Descript
use_when: The operator edits podcasts, screen recordings, courses, sales videos, or interviews.
The workflow benefits from transcript-based editing, filler-word cleanup, or lightweight video/audio production.
The article is about recording-to-assets, creator production systems, or lean media operations.
do_not_use_when: The task is only text generation or document editing.
The operator needs professional-grade motion graphics or complex timeline editing.
A free recorder and manual transcript workflow is sufficient.
approved_tools.example_disclosure: Disclosure: ForgeCore may earn a commission if you buy Descript through a partner link, but it is best for operators who actually edit audio or video every week.

approved_tools.name: Repurpose.io
use_when: The workflow distributes video or audio content across multiple platforms.
The reader already publishes consistently and wants fewer manual posting steps.
The article is about content operations, distribution automation, or creator systems.
do_not_use_when: The reader has not proven a repeatable content cadence yet.
The content requires heavy manual customization per platform.
The operator only publishes one channel.
approved_tools.example_disclosure: Disclosure: ForgeCore may earn a commission if you buy Repurpose.io through a partner link, but it is only worth it after your content cadence is already consistent.

approved_tools.name: Canva Pro
use_when: The workflow creates lead magnets, checklists, social posts, simple landing-page assets, or visual templates.
The reader is not a designer but needs polished business assets quickly.
The article is about content packaging, lead magnets, creator offers, or small-business marketing assets.
do_not_use_when: The asset is mostly text and can ship as a simple Google Doc or PDF.
The operator already has a designer or brand system.
The task requires advanced design, illustration, or layout control.
approved_tools.example_disclosure: Disclosure: ForgeCore may earn a commission if you buy Canva Pro through a partner link, but a free document is enough for many simple lead magnets.

approved_tools.name: Zapier
use_when: The workflow connects repeatable triggers and actions across business apps.
The operator needs a practical automation layer for follow-up, routing, alerts, or handoffs.
The article is about no-code automation, agents, lead follow-up, or operations systems.
do_not_use_when: The process changes daily and is not ready to automate.
A simple checklist or saved prompt is enough.
The workflow requires complex custom logic better handled in code.
approved_tools.example_disclosure: No affiliate disclosure needed unless an approved partner link is added later.

approved_tools.name: beehiiv
use_when: The workflow is about newsletter publishing, sponsorships, audience growth, referral programs, or newsletter monetization.
The reader needs a newsletter operating system rather than a generic email tool.
do_not_use_when: The operator only needs basic transactional email.
The article is not about publishing, audience growth, or email monetization.
approved_tools.example_disclosure: No affiliate disclosure needed unless an approved partner link is added later.
